hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreCompact", "additionalContext": "CONTEXT WINDOW CLOSING — Run the context-window save protocol NOW before this compaction. 1. Write session state to _AI/MEMORY/session-state-[YYYY-MM-DD].md — include completed work, open items, next moves per project, staged improvement flags, files written, decisions made. 2. Flush any improvement flags to _AI/MEMORY/improvements-log.md. 3. Output to user: TO RESUME: Start a new chat and run /daily. Do not skip this — compaction will erase active context."}}'
